message:
🐛 Use GITHUB_TOKEN for issue creation instead of COPILOT_TOKEN (#335)

The COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN PAT doesn't have issues:write permission on
console-kb. The workflow's built-in GITHUB_TOKEN already has this
permission via the workflow permissions block. Remove the unused
COPILOT_TOKEN env var and constant.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
